experiences.name: MindAR Demo — 3D Model
experiences.description: Namuna karta ustida animatsiyali 3D model paydo bo'ladi. Karta rasmini boshqa ekranda oching va kamerani tuting.

experiences.name: Face AR — Virtual Ko'zoynak
experiences.description: Yuzingizga virtual ko'zoynak kiydiriladi. Old kamerani yuzingizga qarating.

experiences.name: VR — 360° Shahar Video
experiences.description: 360 darajali shahar manzarasini VR rejimda tomosha qiling. VR ko'zoynak yoki sichqoncha bilan aylantirib ko'ring.

experiences.name: VR — Virtual Shahar 3D Modeli
experiences.description: 3D shahar modelini VR muhitida ko'ring. Sichqoncha bilan aylantiring yoki klaviatura bilan harakatlaning.

experiences.name: Markerless AR — Polga Joylash
experiences.description: WebXR yordamida 3D modelni haqiqiy polga yoki stol yuzasiga joylang. iOS Safari yoki Chrome Android kerak.
